mechanism_narrative: Consistent monthly increases in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) reflect economic expansion and rising corporate earnings, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following month.
evidence_refs: fact:Payrolls increased by 38,000 in May 2016, maintaining an upward trend
failure_condition: If PAYEMS declines month-over-month and the 20-day forward S&P 500 return is positive more than 50% of the time, or if the rank IC of PAYEMS change against returns is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate (UNRATE) falls below 5%, it signals a tight labor market that historically leads to wage growth and consumer spending, boosting equity prices over the next week.
failure_condition: If UNRATE is below 5% and the 5-day forward return is negative more than 40% of the time, or the average return is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) over any 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of subdued consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) and a near-zero federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) indicates accommodative monetary policy, which reduces discount rates and supports equity valuations over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:CPI inflation around 1% YoY and Fed funds rate at 0.37% in mid-2016
failure_condition: If the interaction term (CPIAUCSL * FEDFUNDS) has a positive rank correlation with forward returns when both are low (contradicting the predicted negative impact), or if the rank IC of the interaction is below 0.03 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) serve as a leading indicator for economic activity. When real GDP (GDPC1) is growing above a 2% annualized rate, rising housing starts signal strong demand and positive equity returns over the next quarter. Conversely, falling housing starts during above-trend GDP growth warn of a potential slowdown and negative returns.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1,172 thousand units in April 2016, up from previous months
failure_condition: When GDP growth exceeds 2%, the rank correlation between HOUST change and forward 60-day returns is not significantly positive (rank IC < 0.05) over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) rising month-over-month signals increasing manufacturing output and economic momentum, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 103.55 in May 2016, up 0.3% from April
failure_condition: If INDPRO month-over-month changes have zero or negative rank correlation with 20-day forward returns over any 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: When monthly retail sales (RSAFS) exceed $450 billion, it indicates robust consumer spending, which drives corporate revenues and boosts equity prices over the next week.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 455,644 in May 2016, above threshold
failure_condition: If RSAFS exceeds 450,000 and the 5-day forward S&P 500 return is negative more than 45% of the time, or the average return is not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The interaction between rising employment (PAYEMS) and increasing retail sales (RSAFS) reinforces a virtuous cycle of income and consumption, leading to stronger earnings and positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: If the combined signal (e.g., product of PAYEMS and RSAFS changes) does not have a rank IC above 0.03 against forward returns over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The predictive power of GDPC1 growth on S&P 500 forward returns flips sign depending on the unemployment rate regime. When UNRATE is below 5% (tight labor market), rising GDP signals late-cycle risks and negative returns over the next quarter. When UNRATE is above 5%, rising GDP signals recovery and positive returns.
failure_condition: If in low unemployment regimes (UNRATE < 5%), the rank correlation between GDPC1 growth and forward 60-day returns is positive (contradicting predicted negative) over a 5-year rolling window, or if the rank IC of the interaction is below 0.03.
